aboutText: Handcrafted shawls from the valleys of Kashmir. Each piece tells a story of tradition, artistry & warmth passed through generations.

banners.title: Wear the Art of Kashmir
banners.subtitle: Sale up to 40% off
banners.description: Discover handwoven shawls crafted by master artisans in the heart of the Kashmir Valley. Every thread carries centuries of tradition.

banners.title: Legendary Pashmina Collection
banners.subtitle: New Season Arrival
banners.description: Pure, authentic Pashmina fibers sourced from the high altitudes of Ladakh. Experience the warmth of tradition.

banners.title: Masterful Embroidery
banners.subtitle: GI-Certified Crafts
banners.description: Intricate Sozni and Kani stitch patterns that have adorned royalty for centuries. Own a piece of history.
